title: HVS Mansion - Patsoi
description: Famously known as the White House of Manipur Inspired by the neo classical architecture, details of the rectangular double hung windows topped with classical arches, repeated columns in a specific style, full height porch featuring a balcony, a medium pitched roof and lastly the repetitions of elements with decorative motifs makes it a design that revives the 5th century classical styles during this 21st century.

title: Ashok’s Residence – Soibam Leikai
description: The Classical Haven is a residential project that blends the elegance of classical architecture with the comfort and functionality of modern design.

title: Hotel at Khuyathong
description: A boutique hotels with minimalist décor with many additional lifestyle amenities. The interior design of the hotel is as unique as its operations. it blends modern elegance with details. It consists of 25 rooms with all modern amenities, a restaurant , a conference hall and a grand reception.

title: Hotel Junuma Interior - Thangal Bazar
description: Designed with the idea to create a welcoming and comfortable environment for guests, prioritize comfort and functionality. Artistic decor, and ambient lighting used to enhance the atmosphere of the overall hotel .

title: Chingkhei’s Residence
description: Architectural and Interior design projects by Form & Space Architects Imphal. Our works is a testament to our impeccable service and our diligent work ethics. Take time to peruse through our portfolio.

title: Johnson’s Residence
description: The double-height stair court is a statement piece, defined by floating wooden steps set against a feature brick wall, with embedded step lighting for drama and safety. The intricate ceiling design, featuring illuminated geometric patterns, draws the eye upward and fills the space with a sense of architectural wonder and openness. Signature Features: • Cantilevered slabs with concealed lighting for a futuristic exterior glow. • Floating stair treads and a sculptural ceiling rendered in layered LED profiles, enriching the home’s spatial and visual identity. • Integrated greenery and premium finishes delivering comfort and elegance throughout.

title: Hari Das’s Residence - Mantripukhri
description: The exterior of the residence boasts a minimalist design with clean lines and a simplified color palette, featuring a combination of materials such as concrete, steel, and wood. Floor-to-ceiling windows and expansive glass surfaces allow abundant natural light to flood the interior spaces while seamlessly connecting the indoors with the outdoors. The interior of the residence embraces an open-concept floor plan that promotes a sense of spaciousness, connectivity, and flexibility. Common areas like the kitchen, dining room, and living room flow seamlessly into one another.

title: Robert’s Residence
description: This residence stands as a testament to sophisticated design thinking—offering both visual grandeur and functional livability suited for contemporary family life in North-East India. This residence exemplifies a harmonious blend of classical elegance and modern comfort, designed to stand out with its distinguished brick-and-white facade and stately architectural proportions.

title: Niranjoy’s Residence
description: This residence stands as a testament to sophisticated modernist design, catering to the needs of urban living with its blend of aesthetics, security, and environmental responsiveness The building’s massing is distinctly modern, with bold layers and cantilevered balconies that create visual movement. The interplay of vertical and horizontal grillwork adds depth and shading, while maximizing ventilation and privacy.

title: Naoba’s Residence - Sawongbung
description: The project was aimed at how architectural design can blend with nature to create a residence that is both functional and aesthetically pleasing.

title: Interior
description: An open shelving partition offers flexibility, organizing the lounge area from adjacent spaces without obstructing light or openness. The clean-lined shelving is styled with curated decor objects, merging practicality with aesthetic appeal. This living room is thoughtfully designed for modern lifestyles, delivering luxury, openness, and versatility in every detail.

title: Samarjit’s Residence
description: This residence captures the spirit of urban comfort and simplicity, presenting a timeless yet contemporary retreat amidst the cityscape Material Palette and Detailing A predominantly white exterior finish is complemented by muted accent shades, producing a fresh, airy aesthetic suitable for urban environments. Railings in slender steel and wood-finished balcony ceilings bring sophistication and warmth to outdoor spaces.

title: Ashish’s Residence – Wangkhei
description: An ode to contemporary design where the building plays with symmetrical lines to elevated the many openings of the structure. The interior finds its ground with warm understated staple wooden finishes. Playing with the level of the floors escalating the buffering space inside the home. An ideally planned spaces gives a new meaning to classical design with a touch of modern sensibility.

title: Akhiljit’s Residence - Porompat
description: The residence is characterized by symmetrical proportions and a balanced layout, hallmarks of classical architecture. The facade features prominent architectural elements such as columns, pediments, and detailed moldings. With all modern amenities and facilities all planned out.

title: Surjit and Sapria’s Interior - Bamon Leikai
description: Residential Interior Design : Emphasized with the idea of creating aesthetics and well functional living spaces through colours, patterns and textures.

title: Sangai Continental - Thangal Bazar
description: In the heart of Imphal city Sangai continental is designed with a sequence centering towards a warm welcome entity. The dining area considered as centerpiece of the space with the distinctive elements of the surrounding area inspired the design, selection of materials, and color. The wood-paneled of the interior making the space rhyming to the spatial arrangement of the entire hotel.

title: Hotel Yaiphaba Reception Interior - Thangal Bazaar
description: The renovation of the hotel reception aims to create a welcoming and efficient space that leaves a lasting impression on guests The reception was redesigned to be both functional and aesthetically pleasing. It is spacious enough to accommodate the staff and their equipment, ensuring smoother operations

title: Sangai Express Facade Renovation
description: A Facade Renovation Project with the idea of clean and minimal lines a modern design idea

title: The Legacy – Thangmeiband
description: Commercial project with all modern facilities designed with all amenities and facilities .

title: The Den Restaurant -Nongmeibung
description: The Den Imphal was envisioned with the idea of incorporating the interior with the beautiful scenic view ,to create a harmonious blend of aesthetics, functionality, and sustainability. This architectural design aims to create a space that is not only visually appealing but also comfortable, functional, and sustainable.

title: JCNT’s Office Interior - Nongmeibung
description: The Idea of Modern Workspace that prioritizes functionality, flexibility, and employee well-being. The design idea aims to create a workspace that not only meets the functional needs of a modern office but also promotes employee well-being

title: JJ Montessori School - Ghari
description: A child-centered approach to create an environment that is safe, engaging, and conducive to learning and development, varied use of colours and are blended well finely and playfully. Used vibrant and stimulating colors that are age-appropriate in classrooms and common areas.

title: Tairen Restaurant
description: An open type restaurant design layout that features a large and spacious dining area, with an outdoor or semi-outdoor setting. Idea for creating a relaxed and inviting atmosphere, as well as allowing natural light and ventilation to enter the space.

title: Robinson’s Residence - ThambalKhong
description: Architectural design and Interior. A modern architectural residential project which emphasizes function and a streamlined form over ornamentation.

title: Imocha’s Residence - Keisampat
description: Modern design residence that features contemporary architecture, materials, and aesthetics

title: Lakhsabh’s Residence - Yumnam Leikai
description: The main goal of this project was to transform the client’s home into a space that not only fits their functional needs but also reflects their personal taste.

title: Lukhoi’s Residence - Canchipur
description: A harmonious facade that seamlessly blends the style of modern and traditional design. The roof also plays a significant role in defining the style of a residence. Extending the fusion of styles to the outdoor landscaping spaces

title: Mix Use Residential building - Thangmeiband
description: Architectural and Interior design projects by Form & Space Architects Imphal. Our works is a testament to our impeccable service and our diligent work ethics. Take time to peruse through our portfolio.

title: Mang’s Residence - Langol
description: Architectural and Interior design projects by Form & Space Architects Imphal. Our works is a testament to our impeccable service and our diligent work ethics. Take time to peruse through our portfolio.

title: Gautier’s Residence - Kakwa
description: Architectural and Interior design projects by Form & Space Architects Imphal. Our works is a testament to our impeccable service and our diligent work ethics. Take time to peruse through our portfolio.

title: Khagemba’s Residence - Tiddim Road
description: A centric residential design of form and space that gives a clean aesthetic formwork. A careful selection of minimal color to fit the design understanding of the client. The Façade glazing highlighting the sunny orientation of the plot and displays a harmonious arrangement of windows and balconies. The overall design with the dominant selection of material is weaved into its functionality

title: Inaocha ‘s Residence - Kangabam Leikai
description: Design Idea approached using simple and geometric forms, clean lines, and minimal ornamentation. Emphasized more on functionality, efficiency, and comfort over tradition and aesthetics.

title: David’s Residence - Malom
description: A fusion of style in a modern residence with a unique and captivating design that blends traditional and contemporary elements. This approach allowed the homeowners to enjoy the comforts of modern living while incorporating elements of heritage and culture.

title: Simon’s Kitchen Renovation
description: A Complete Kitchen Renovation Work. The kitchen completely lacked modern amenities such as a dishwasher, a large refrigerator and all essential amenities, the plumbing and electrical systems needed updating to meet current safety standards , therefore the idea of transforming the kitchen space took place to make it more functional, enjoyable, and durable.

title: Chandrama & Arfat’s Residence - Laipham Khunou
description: Designed for a nuclear family with well designed and planned interior, with minimalistic approach to the exterior and interior design. A lawn and swimming pool for the recreational purpose planned well and in blend with the design of the residence.

title: Shemrock’s Hall
description: Shemrock’s Hall designed with an understanding of the emotions to be felt by the audience. Keeping it simple and clean. All the colors are played with a motive to use the lighting of the space as a highlight. The murals intertwine with the ceiling patterns and columns for additional art and cultural activities.

title: Tiny Tots Unique School - Ghari
description: Plan for future growth and expansion , the project was envisioned, The scale of the building child-friendly, with lower ceilings and appropriately sized furnishings. Using proportionate design elements that make children feel comfortable and not overwhelmed by their surroundings.

title: Dr Rajen’s Landscaping - Chingmeirong
description: The small yard was envisioned with the idea of transforming the outdoor space into a visually appealing and functional area, an idea to create a layered landscape – just like in nature.

title: Rubitech’s Office Interior - Chingmeirong
description: The Idea of creating a comfortable, functional, and aesthetically pleasing work environment for employees and visitors. Facilities and amenities that enhance the performance, comfort, and well-being of the office employees.

title: Renovation Project for Daughter’s Room - Uripok
description: Architectural and Interior design projects by Form & Space Architects Imphal. Our works is a testament to our impeccable service and our diligent work ethics. Take time to peruse through our portfolio.

title: Commercial Project - Porompat
description: This modern commercial project is a cutting-edge office building located in the heart of a bustling urban center. It aims to provide a dynamic and efficient workspace that meets the needs of today's businesses while setting new standards. The building boasts a sleek and minimalist exterior characterized by clean lines, large glass windows, and a blend of concrete and glass. The use of reflective surfaces creates a striking appearance that stands out in the urban landscape
